programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: When Morgan's sister sees a woman who looks like their presumed-dead cousin, the BAU reopens the case of her disappearance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Amish Affair
programme.desc: Hannah knows her secret relationship with Aaron, a charismatic Amish leader, has them both living in sin, so she decides to end it. However, when Aaron's wife suspiciously dies, she finds herself framed for murder and fighting to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs; Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: How do they make garden forks, English toffee, paint chip cards and Bundt pans? Find out here as more everyday items are put under the microscope.

programme.desc: Driving in reverse; blindfold challenge; practicing clutch control.

programme.title: East Harbour Heroes
programme.sub-title: Between A Fin And A Hard Place
programme.desc: There's chaos on both land and sea as a big ship prepares to sail with millions in cargo and a skipper faces a potential season-ending disaster.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The RBC Heritage 2026 Final Round determines the winner of a $20 million purse and 700 FedEx Cup points at Harbour Town Golf Links. Justin Thomas, the defending champion, looks for a rare back-to-back victory at Hilton Head Island.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar asks for Karen's help in getting culinary revenge against Emma.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: Battle of the Generations
programme.desc: Four contestants from different generations; Baby Boomer, Gen X, Millennial, and Gen Z face-off through multiple rounds of pop culture trivia.

programme.title: Percy Jackson & the Olympians: The Lightning Thief
programme.desc: Always trouble-prone, the life of teenager Percy Jackson (Logan Lerman) gets a lot more complicated when he learns he's the son of the Greek god Poseidon. At a training ground for the children of deities, Percy learns to harness his divine powers and prepare for the adventure of a lifetime: he must prevent a feud among the Olympians from erupting into a devastating war on Earth, and rescue his mother from the clutches of Hades, god of the underworld.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Lacey try to figure out their relationship; Emma's on the warpath.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent fears he is losing his hair; Wanda gets a new lamp and has to fight to keep it.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey starts a coffee shop newsletter; Oscar's childhood dream.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

programme.desc: Davis regains sense of smell; Brent realizes how little he knows about his friends.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Omar is a funny guy who knows all about the Cash Cab! He even thinks it may be the Cash Cab; as he gets into the cab, he wishes it was the Cash Cab.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: When this couple gets in the cab, it seems as though Michelle knows what's going on; but it quickly becomes clear that this girl is just a joker without a clue.

programme.desc: Electra is stunned by the truth; R.J. admits where his animosity towards Will stems.

programme.title: TMZ Live
programme.desc: A candid look at how the gossip site operates, bringing viewers into the site's newsroom, where the daily chats take place; viewers present their opinions on the featured topics through social media, phone calls and video chat.
